title: Xert Breakthrough Workout
description: Designed to achieve a fitness breakthrough — progressive overload to failure

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/6. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/6. 90-90% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/6. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 10:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/6. Power: 90-90%, Cadence: 90-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 32% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 2/6. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 4 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2: 8:00 at 100%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 2: 8:00 at 100%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2: 100% for 8:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 8:00 at 100%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 4 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 52% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 56% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 4:00 at 115%. Then 3:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 56% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 56% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. 115% for 4:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 39 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 39 minutes of work done. 19 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 39 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 19 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 2 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 68% complete. 120% for 3:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 2 reps left. 16 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/6. 120% FTP × 3:00. Seated. 2 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 73% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 2:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/6. You're 76% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 76% through session. Rep 5/6. You've done 25min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 76% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 125% for 2:00. Then 1:30 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 79% done. 0 intervals left. 11 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 79% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 79% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 79% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 11 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/6. 82% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 150% × 1:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 1:00 at 150%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 150% for 1:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 150% × 1:00. Alternating, 90-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 83% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 51 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
